headings.text: design From Barcelona, we design spas that

paragraphs: At Aquavia, we believe that well-being

integrate seamlessly into every space, transforming it into a unique experience. We have our own in-house design team and collaborate with renowned designers and prestigious studios that contribute to the creation of our products. Each creation reǼects our commitment to aesthetics, innovation, and comfort, oǺering an experience that is not only seen, but also lived and felt.

headings.text: Quality in detail to manufacture spas and

paragraphs: Since 1988, we have perfected every
swimspas that withstand the test of time.

Comfort starts with what is not seen: robust structures, precise ǻnishes, and materials designed to last. We back it up with industry-leading warranties: 15 years on the structure 10 years on acrylic 2 years on components

headings.text: Our it is an experience that renews both

paragraphs: Your well-being goes beyond comfort;
body and mind.

We combine three technologies to care for every part of you: Water Pressure Massage Works in depth, relieves tension, and revitalizes muscles. Air Massage Gently envelops the body, stimulates circulation, and melts away stress. Premium Blue Wave System Massage A perfect fusion of air and water that embraces, restores, and regenerates from within.

headings.text: Commitment to of our philosophy. Our spas are
the environment respecting the planet without

paragraphs: Designing with awareness is part
born from a sincere commitment,

compromising your comfort. Thermal insulation, included in all our models, maintains the temperature from base to cover, saving energy from the very ǻrst moment. Additionally, two exclusive systems work to optimize energy consumption, reducing it by up to 80%. We believe in responsible comfort, respecting the environment without sacriǻcing design or innovation.

headings.text: A tailored solutions that integrate naturally into

paragraphs: More than just spas, we oǺer versatile
any environment.

No two spas are the same, nor are there two identical ways to enjoy them. Our collections encompass multiple styles, functionalities, and ǻnishes to adapt to every need. Flexibility and attention to detail ensure that every Aquavia spa retains its essence: design, quality, and a personalized experience. You choose how you want to enjoy it. We make it happen.
